violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen near the drive thru area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: grill grill table scissors scissors holder rice bin unit thermolizer panel next to thermolizer metal trays with wheels in walk in cooler for holding chicken boxes New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The floors especially around the pressure cookers have an accumulation of oil, soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
One panel of ceiling lights in the walk in cooler were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2025

3 bay sink basin was observed leaking. Handsink peddle for hot water was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. Lowboy cold holding unit 2. Hot hold unit gaskets 3. Sides of fryers New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
Refuse area enclosure ground was observed with grease, litter and soil residue. Area to be maintained clean and free of litter. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
Tiled floor grout was observed in poor repair. Physical facilities to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: 1. Floors under cookline and equipment 2. POS wires above makeline and vents (dust) 3. Chicken walk-in cooler door and fan guards 4. Floor drains 5. 3 bay sink top baseboard The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
